homeTip.connectText: Connect your GitHub repository for automatic deployments on every push.
homeTip.createText: Create your first project to start deploying.
homeTip.settingsText: Set up environment variables and custom domains in project settings.

envVars.text: Add encrypted environment variables and secrets to any project.
envVars.label: Open projects

customDomain.text: Point a custom domain at a project — HTTPS is provisioned automatically.
customDomain.label: Open projects

autoDeploy.text: Connect GitHub to auto-deploy every push, no CI to wire up.
autoDeploy.label: Open Git settings

rollback.text: Roll back to any previous deployment in one click.
rollback.label: View deployments

apps.text: Install self-hosted apps like Gitea, n8n, and Metabase in one click.
apps.label: Browse apps

servers.text: Connect your own servers over SSH and deploy to them from here.
servers.label: Manage servers

jobs.text: Schedule commands with cron jobs — retries, live logs, and history included.
jobs.label: Open jobs

backups.text: Set up automatic backups for your databases and volumes.
backups.label: Configure backups

mail.text: Run your own mail server and webmail, fully self-hosted.
mail.label: Set up mail

team.text: Invite teammates and scope their access per project.
team.label: Manage team

welcome.title: Launch your first project
welcome.subtitle: Connect a repository or start from a template — Openship builds it, ships it, and hands you a live URL in minutes.

header.subtitle: Monitor your platform usage and manage resources
